productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Green & Blue Check Shirt
description: Style Note wrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with its spread collar is a testimony to their eye for fashion. The soft cotton fabric will keep you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look. Product Details Green and blue checked shirt, has a spread collar with a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with mid buttoned tabs, yoked back, one pocket on left chest, stitch detailing, branding on the pocket and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Flat dry in shade or tumble dry Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular The model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
